description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a medieval or fantasy-inspired outfit, featuring a long tunic with wide sleeves, a belted waist, and layered shoulder armor. The tunic is paired with fitted pants and tall, strapped boots, giving the appearance of a warrior or adventurer. The figure's right arm is covered with a metallic-looking gauntlet, while the left arm is unarmored, suggesting asymmetrical protection. The character has medium-length, wavy hair that frames the face and falls to the neck. The overall attire is detailed with subtle patterns and textures, and the stance is assertive, with one fist clenched and the other hand relaxed. The materials and construction evoke a blend of fabric, leather, and metal elements typical of a fantasy setting.
description: A male adult in a fantasy-style tunic, belted at the waist, with tall boots and a single armored gauntlet, standing in a confident pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed tunic, belted waist, armored right arm, and assertive facial expression.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the tunic, the layered shoulder armor, and the tall boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tunic, the draped fabric, and the full length of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the metallic gauntlet on the right arm and the layered clothing details.
attribute_clothing_type: long tunic with wide sleeves, belted waist, shoulder armor, fitted pants, and tall strapped boots
